headline: Coca-Cola shares are trading higher after the company reported better-than-expected Q1 financial results and raised its FY26 adjusted EPS guidance above estimates.

headline: UBS Maintains Buy on Colgate-Palmolive, Raises Price Target to $106
summary: UBS  analyst Peter Grom   maintains Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $100 to $106.
